Vision

To empower enterprises with AI-driven intelligence and data-enabled innovation, helping them operate smarter, accelerate transformation, and unlock sustainable business value.
Mission

To be the strategic partner throughout our customers’ technology transformative journey, empowering businesses with seamless AI, data, and analytics solutions that drive measurable impact, enhance decision-making, and unlock new growth opportunities.
Our Values

							Integrity						

						Act ethically and own your decisions; ensure everyone’s voice is heard.					
G

							Growth						

						Pursue continuous self-improvement; stay resilient in the face of challenges.					
N

							Nurture						

						Embrace creative approaches and foster an environment where learning and empathy thrive.

Our Leaders
Executive Team

						Sriram Nallam						
Executive Chairman 
Sriram Nallam
Executive Chairman 

									As Founder & CEO of Seanergy.ai, Sriram Nallam leads the company’s strategic vision, innovation, and growth, driving AI-powered transformation for enterprises. With over 25 years of experience in software, AI, and data-driven solutions, he has been at the forefront of helping businesses harness AI, automation, and analytics to optimize decision-making and achieve measurable impact.


Sriram founded Seanergy Digital in 2004, becoming a trusted technology partner to global organizations, delivering consistent year-over-year growth across the United States. Under his leadership, the company has rebranded to Seanergy.ai, reflecting a renewed focus on AI, data, and automation-driven solutions that empower businesses to navigate their digital transformation seamlessly.


Before founding Seanergy, Sriram served as Head of Product Development at SDG Software Technologies, where he played a pivotal role in building mission-critical solutions for global stock markets. His deep technical expertise and business acumen have positioned him as a visionary leader in AI-driven enterprise transformation.


Sriram holds a degree in Computer Science from Andhra University. Beyond his corporate role, he is passionate about mentorship, motivational speaking, and supporting underprivileged children in government schools, leveraging his knowledge to inspire the next generation of innovators.								

						Gregg J Markham						
Chief Operating Officer 
Gregg J Markham
Chief Operating Officer 

									Gregg J. Markham is a results-driven leader with a strong background in military service, corporate leadership, and large-scale operational growth. A U.S. Naval Academy graduate with an MBA from Colorado State University, he served as a Submarine Officer in the U.S. Navy, qualifying as a nuclear engineer and leading operations aboard two nuclear submarines. His military career also included strategic leadership roles at NATO and in East Africa, overseeing large-scale infrastructure and technology modernization initiatives.


Transitioning to the private sector, Gregg has led operational and technology-driven transformations, driving significant cost reductions, efficiency improvements, and successful business expansions. He has a track record of optimizing processes, scaling operations, and positioning organizations for long-term growth.


Gregg now brings his expertise to Seanergy.ai as Chief Operating Officer , focusing on operational excellence, scalability, and strategic growth.								

						Satya Sri Nallam						
Chief Operating Officer - India
Satya Sri Nallam
Chief Operating Officer - India

									Satya Sri Nallam is a dynamic Chief Operating Officer at Seanergy.ai, bringing years of experience in strategic operations and leadership. She excels in streamlining processes, optimizing resources, and driving financial and operational excellence across global teams. Her expertise extends to digital transformation initiatives, where she aligns technological advancements with corporate objectives to ensure sustainable growth and enhanced market presence.


Satya's educational background is equally impressive, having earned a Bachelor’s in Business Administration from the prestigious SP Jain School of Global Management. Her academic journey took her across Dubai, Singapore, and Australia, equipping her with a global perspective and a solid foundation in business management principles. This diverse educational experience has played a pivotal role in shaping her ability to lead cross-functional teams and execute complex strategies in multicultural settings.


Beyond her professional achievements, Satya is passionate about mentoring high-performing teams and driving organizational innovation. Her strategic thinking, combined with a data-driven approach, positions her as a thought leader in the digital transformation space.								

						Phanii Pydimarri						
Chief Strategy Officer
Phanii Pydimarri
Chief Strategy Officer

									Phanii Pydimarri is a seasoned executive in data, analytics, and AI, with nearly two decades of experience driving enterprise transformation across healthcare, manufacturing, and consumer technology sectors. As Chief Strategy Officer at Seanergy.ai, Phanii leads the company’s strategic vision, aligning innovation with business priorities to unlock sustainable growth and measurable outcomes.


Prior to joining Seanergy, Phanii held senior leadership roles at industry-leading organizations. At Health Care Service Corporation (HCSC), he served as Head of Strategy and Planning, where he led enterprise-wide data and AI initiatives tied to drive direct business growth. At Stanley Black & Decker, he served as Head of AI & Advanced Analytics Products, leading AI product commercialization efforts. Previously, Phanii was Chief Analytics Officer at Bose Corporation, where he architected the company’s global data strategy and laid the foundation for its enterprise analytics transformation.


Beyond his executive roles, Phanii is an active thought leader and industry contributor. He serves as an Advisory Board Member at the University of North Texas College of Information, a Product Advisory Board Member at Modal, and an Editorial Board Member at Chief Data Officer Magazine. He is also a mentor to early-career professionals and a strong advocate for responsible AI adoption and data-driven decision-making.


Phanii holds an Executive MBA from Northwestern University’s Kellogg School of Management and a master’s degree from the New Jersey Institute of Technology.
								

						Kiran Vasudeva						
Chief Technology Officer
Kiran Vasudeva
Chief Technology Officer

									As Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at Seanergy.ai, Kiran Vasudeva leads the company’s technology vision, AI-driven innovation, and product strategy, ensuring seamless integration of AI, data, and automation into enterprise ecosystems. With over 20 years of industry experience, including 18 years at Seanergy, Kiran’s journey from a technology leader to CTO is a testament to his deep expertise, dedication, and pivotal role in shaping the company’s evolution.


Kiran has been a cornerstone of Seanergy’s technological transformation, playing a key role in architecting and delivering enterprise-grade AI and data-driven solutions. His ability to bridge complex business challenges with scalable, high-impact technologies has been instrumental in Seanergy.ai’s success. Through a collaborative, problem-solving approach, he works closely with clients, ensuring their AI adoption is both strategic and results driven.


Having started his career at SDG Software Technologies and iSOFT R&D Pvt. Ltd., Kiran honed his skills in software engineering, enterprise architecture, and technical leadership before joining Seanergy. Over nearly two decades, he has grown within the organization, driving Seanergy’s shift from a digital solutions provider to an AI-powered enterprise transformation partner.


Kiran holds a Master’s degree in Computer Applications. Beyond his role as CTO, he is passionate about mentoring young talent, solving technical challenges, and fostering innovation in software development. In his free time, he enjoys developing software utilities, solving crosswords, and engaging in technical problem-solving with aspiring technologists.								

						Ravi Puli						
Vice President, Client Delivery
Ravi Puli
Vice President, Client Delivery

									As Vice President of Client Delivery at Seanergy.ai, Ravi Puli leads the company’s Delivery and Engineering functions, ensuring seamless execution of AI, data, and automation solutions for enterprise clients. With over 20 years of industry experience, including 18 years at Seanergy, Ravi has been a driving force behind the company’s commitment to innovation, operational excellence, and customer success.


Ravi’s expertise spans end-to-end solution delivery, AI-powered engineering, and enterprise technology transformation. His ability to architect and implement high-impact solutions has helped clients across Finance, Healthcare, Transportation, and Logistics optimize operations, enhance decision-making, and achieve measurable business outcomes.


Since the early days of Seanergy, Ravi has played a pivotal role in shaping its delivery frameworks and engineering best practices. Now, as part of Seanergy.ai’s transformation, he leads initiatives that align AI and automation with business objectives, ensuring that every project delivers scalable, efficient, and future-ready solutions.


Ravi holds a Master’s degree in Computer Science from Nagarjuna University. Outside of work, he is passionate about mentoring technology teams, driving engineering excellence, and exploring emerging innovations that push the boundaries of AI-driven enterprise solutions.

VP Solutions & Strategic Accounts
Teja Gopagoni
VP Solutions & Strategic Accounts

									As Vice President Solutions & Strategic Accounts at Seanergy.ai, Teja Gopagoni leads business growth, client engagement, and strategic partnerships, driving the expansion of AI, data, and automation solutions across North America. With a strong focus on market development and technology alliances, Teja plays a pivotal role in positioning Seanergy.ai as a trusted partner for enterprise transformation.

						Sriram Nallam						
Executive Chairman 
Sriram Nallam
Executive Chairman 

									As Founder & CEO of Seanergy.ai, Sriram Nallam leads the company’s strategic vision, innovation, and growth, driving AI-powered transformation for enterprises. With over 25 years of experience in software, AI, and data-driven solutions, he has been at the forefront of helping businesses harness AI, automation, and analytics to optimize decision-making and achieve measurable impact.


Sriram founded Seanergy Digital in 2004, becoming a trusted technology partner to global organizations, delivering consistent year-over-year growth across the United States. Under his leadership, the company has rebranded to Seanergy.ai, reflecting a renewed focus on AI, data, and automation-driven solutions that empower businesses to navigate their digital transformation seamlessly.


Before founding Seanergy, Sriram served as Head of Product Development at SDG Software Technologies, where he played a pivotal role in building mission-critical solutions for global stock markets. His deep technical expertise and business acumen have positioned him as a visionary leader in AI-driven enterprise transformation.

						Vikas Shah						
Executive Director
Vikas Shah
Executive Director

									Vikas Shah is a transformative business leader with a distinguished track record of scaling sustainable ventures and turning around complex operational challenges. As a Board Member at Seanergy.ai, Vikas brings decades of strategic leadership, cross-industry expertise, and a passion for building scalable, mission-driven enterprises.


Over the course of his career, Vikas has held senior executive roles in global organizations across technology, utilities, and venture capital. Most recently, he served as Operating Partner at Sporos Capital, a special situations fund focused on reviving stressed assets. In this capacity, he successfully led operational turnaround initiatives for high-growth ventures including GoMechanic, GoodtoGo, and MoEVing.


Previously, Vikas spent over a decade as Chief Operating Officer of WaterHealth International, a pioneering company delivering safe, affordable drinking water across underserved communities in India, Ghana, and Nigeria. Under his leadership, the company expanded from 100 to over 1,000 water purification plants, serving more than 10 million people globally.


Vikas began his career in consulting and venture capital with PSi Inc. in the U.S., advising Fortune 500 firms such as John Deere and ConAgra on India market entry. He later joined Tata Teleservices (TTSL) as one of its first employees and rose to become the youngest President within the Tata Group. There, he built and scaled the Access Business Unit from ₹30 crore to over ₹1,000 crore in revenue in just six years.


Recognized for his commitment to social innovation, Vikas was a finalist for the Social Entrepreneur of the Year by the Schwab Foundation at the World Economic Forum (2016). He has also been honored by the All India Management Association and Hyderabad Management Association for his leadership in environmental sustainability and organizational excellence.


Vikas holds a Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering and an MBA in Finance. He is a frequent speaker on leadership, sustainability, and impact innovation.
								

						Lakshmi Nallam						
Co-Founder 
Lakshmi Nallam
Co-Founder 

									As Co-Founder of Seanergy.ai, Lakshmi Nallam leads the company’s financial strategy, operational efficiency, and long-term growth planning. With a strong focus on scalability, profitability, and value-driven financial management, she ensures Seanergy.ai’s financial health aligns with its mission to empower enterprises through AI, data, and automation solutions.


With over two decades of leadership experience, Lakshmi has been instrumental in Seanergy’s evolution from a technology solutions provider to an AI-driven transformation partner. Her expertise spans financial planning, risk management, business operations, and strategic investments, making her a key architect of the company’s sustained growth and market expansion.


Lakshmi plays a critical role in optimizing financial performance, resource allocation, and capital investments, ensuring that Seanergy.ai continues to scale while maintaining strong financial discipline. She works closely with executive leadership to drive data-driven financial decision-making, enhance operational efficiencies, and fuel innovation.


As a co-founder, Lakshmi has been at the heart of Seanergy.ai’s transformation, reinforcing its mission to deliver AI-powered business solutions that create measurable impact. Her leadership extends beyond finance, as she is deeply committed to mentoring emerging leaders, fostering a high-performance culture, and championing diversity in technology and leadership.
